tape: Equities lean risk-on at the open: June PPI cooled (-0.3% headline, core +0.2%) and ASML's +30% capacity guide lifts the AI/chip trade, Nasdaq futures +0.5%, VIX 16.36 (-0.9%); the live tail is energy -- WTI back above $80 (+0.9%) after fresh US-Iran attacks overnight and the reinstated Iranian-oil blockade, partially re-validating research's risk_off oil leg while quant_regime still reads calm_drift.

alerts.headline: Cool June PPI (-0.3% headline) + ASML AI-capex read = risk-on equity open (Nasdaq fut +0.5%, VIX 16.36), BUT oil is back >$80 on renewed overnight US-Iran attacks + reinstated blockade -- the energy/geopolitics tail is live again vs yesterday's calm read. Regime split: equities calm_drift, oil the tail.

HELD -- OPERATIONAL: risk.json flags the price cache badly desynced (cache 1.555 last 7/8 vs broker 2.19, 38.9%) and the stop line $2.03 sits ABOVE the stale cache, so a stop-check on that cache could phantom-sell a +$3.11 winner. No fresh July offering (only carried WrapShield/ATF/Frenel PR from 7/9). Do-not-ADD ($200M baby-shelf). Human/reconciler must confirm live feed drives stops.

CANDIDATE (6.17, below 6.25 line): no NEW July offering, but ~30% dilution stands -- $50M registered direct (27.6M sh at $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly PIPE closed 6/26, 7/6 F-3 registers 3.03M PIPE sh for resale. Stock ~$1.70 BELOW the $1.81 offer; CEO 7/7 buy came AFTER the raise. Concur risk.json -- do not buy as insider breakout.
CANDIDATE (6.1, below line): textbook pump-and-dump -- HK microcap ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 (6/16), now ~$3.59, no fundamental driver. Reject on pump veto. Concur risk.json.

CANDIDATE (5.17, below line): the +4.0 insider score is offering-backer accumulation, NOT management conviction -- RA Capital bought 15,102 sh at ~$8.97 on 7/10, but stock ~$9.35 still sits BELOW the $11.52 May $300M-offering price. Cantor reiterated Overweight/$40 PT. Treat as dilution overhang; do not buy as fresh insider breakout.

WATCHLIST: no fresh catalyst -- ~$10.3 sits ABOVE mean analyst PT after the 6/24 $100M offering (13.5M sh at $7.41). Real dilution beside the real ABS-201 story; keep flagged so it is not bought as a fresh breakout. FinBERT -0.027.
